name: Certificate Expiry Monitoring
description: Scheduled certificate expiry monitoring that scans all tracked certificates, identifies those expiring within 30 or 7 days, and routes accordingly. Certificates expiring within 7 days trigger an automatic renewal attempt via the certificate manager integration. Certificates expiring within 30 days generate a planning ticket. All actions are reported to the infrastructure team on Slack.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Certificate Manager
required_integrations.reason: Scan certificate inventory and trigger automated renewals for expiring certificates

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create planning tickets for certificates approaching expiry within 30 days

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the infrastructure team of certificate expiry status and renewal actions

config.description: Runs daily at 8 AM to scan all tracked certificates for upcoming expiry

config.query: SELECT cert_id, domain, issuer, expiry_date, DATEDIFF(expiry_date, NOW()) AS days_remaining, auto_renew_eligible FROM certificates WHERE expiry_date <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND status = 'active' ORDER BY expiry_date ASC
config.description: Find all certificates expiring within the next 30 days, ordered by soonest expiry
Check if any certificates are expiring within the next 30 days
Determine if any certificates are critically close to expiry (7 days or less)

parameters.reason: Automated renewal — certificate expiring within 7 days

config.description: Trigger automated renewal for all certificates expiring within 7 days that are eligible for auto-renewal

notify.message:
CERTIFICATE EXPIRY — URGENT
Certificates expiring within 7 days:
{{code_1.expiring_certs | filter(days_remaining <= 7) | map(domain + ' — ' + days_remaining + ' days')}}

Auto-renewal attempted for eligible certificates. Please verify renewal status and manually renew any that failed.

config.description: Send urgent Slack notification about certificates expiring within 7 days and auto-renewal status

parameters.summary: Certificate Renewals Due — {{code_1.expiring_certs.length}} certs within 30 days

config.description: Create a planning ticket for certificates expiring within 30 days that are not yet critical

parameters.note: Daily certificate scan completed at {{trigger_1.timestamp}}. No certificates expiring within 30 days.

config.description: Log that no certificates are approaching expiry for audit trail
